name: Bahama Golf
about: Bahama Golf is a premier virtual golf destination offering a blend of high-tech simulation, professional coaching, and social entertainment. The facility features advanced indoor simulators with high-speed cameras and sophisticated swing analysis software, allowing golfers of all skill levels to play world-class courses, practice, and receive personalized instruction. Membership tiers provide varying access to simulator hours, lessons, and event hosting, with options ranging from 8 hours to unlimited play. The venue caters to individual practice, group play, leagues, corporate events, and private parties, positioning itself as a comprehensive hub for both serious golfers and social players seeking a modern golf experience.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Uneekor simulators with high-speed cameras providing detailed swing analysis
Access to a PGA-certified Head Professional with 17+ years of competitive and instructional experience
Flexible membership options including unlimited simulator hours and complimentary lessons
Host of leagues and events including individual scrambles and parent-child tournaments
Private event and corporate hosting capabilities with customizable bay packages

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB - Guests can bring their own food and drinks for events
BYOB - Guests can bring their own alcoholic beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: High-speed cameras capture swing motion at 180 fps in 1440x1080 resolution with club face impact analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While the venue doesn't explicitly state club rentals, golfers typically bring their own clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, BYOB is allowed. Guests can bring their own food and drinks, especially for private events and corporate packages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on the simulator and play style, but typically ranges from 1.5 to 2.5 hours.

faq.question: Is Bahama Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Bahama Golf is kid-friendly, offering junior lessons and hosting parent-child scrambles and leagues.
